title: patropyrum tauschii subsp. strangulatum
intro: Patropyrum tauschii subsp. strangulatum, also known as Wild Celery, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wild Celery include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a variety of health-promoting remedies.
